info.name: Office Management API (v1)
info.description:
Office Management API v1.

**Folders:** Health; Auth; Users & teams; Staff approval & profiles; Stock; Work; **Projects** (CRUD, TL/members, progress, **overview dashboard**); Status logs.

**Variables:** `baseUrl` (API root — must match server `PORT` and `.env` `APP_PUBLIC_URL` for images), `token`, `bootstrapKey`, `staffId`, `userId`, `tlUserId`, `teamId`, `projectId`, `stockItemId`, `workId`, `imageUrl`, …

**Images:** Uploads return `filePath` plus absolute **`url`** / **`livePhotoUrl`** / **`cvUrl`**. Open those URLs in a browser, or set server `.env`: `APP_PUBLIC_URL={{baseUrl}}`. Static files: `GET {{baseUrl}}/uploads/<filename>`.

**Projects:** `tlUserId` = lead TL; `memberUserIds` = workers; `GET /projects/reports/overview` = count + progress list; progress update `PUT /projects/:id/progress` (TL/Admin only).

**Success body:** `{ "status": true, "statusCode": 200, "message": "...", "data": { } }`

request.description: Example: `{ "status": true, "statusCode": 200, "message": "...", "data": { "version": "v1" } }`
Success: `data.token`, `data.role`, `data.status`, `data.mustChangePassword`. Save `data.token` to collection variable `token` for Bearer auth.
Always returns 200 with the same `message` (no email enumeration). Check email or server logs (dev) for the 6-digit OTP.
`otp` must be exactly 6 digits from the forgot-password email (or dev console).
Success: `data.user`. Test script saves `userId`; if role is TL/CAPTAIN also sets `tlUserId`.
Requires Bearer token. Only while account is `PENDING_APPROVAL` (draft). Body: any subset of registration fields; at least one field required.
Success: `data.users`.
Use before Create Project. Saves first TL/CAPTAIN `_id` to `{{tlUserId}}`.
SUPER_ADMIN can set any role; others follow promotion rules. Target user must be ACTIVE. Success: `data.user`.

exec: else if (p && p.livePhotoPath) pm.collectionVariables.set('imageUrl', pm.variables.get('baseUrl') + '/' + p.livePhotoPath.replace(/\\/g, '/'));
const cert = p && p.professional && p.professional.certificates && p.professional.certificates[0];

request.description: Response includes `livePhotoUrl`, certificate `url`, `cvUrl`. Test script sets `{{imageUrl}}` for the verify request below.
Multipart field `photo`. Response: `data.profile.livePhotoUrl` — use in `` or open in browser.
Body: `{ "image": "data:image/png;base64,..." }`. Returns `livePhotoUrl`.
Multipart field `cv` (PDF or image). Response: `data.profile.cvUrl`.
Run after Get Staff Profile or any upload. Paste `livePhotoUrl` into collection var `imageUrl`, or use test script. Should return image bytes (200).
Each item `images[]` entry includes `filePath` and `url` for display.

item.name: Add Stock Movement IN (with verification images)

exec: if (tl) pm.collectionVariables.set('tlUserId', typeof tl === 'string' ? tl : (tl._id || tl));

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Wedding catering - June",
  "description": "Full-service catering for 200 guests",
  "clientName": "Acme Corp",
  "status": "ACTIVE",
  "budget": 500000,
  "revenue": 150000,
  "currency": "INR",
  "startDate": "2026-06-01",
  "endDate": "2026-06-15",
  "teamId": "{{teamId}}",
  "tlUserId": "{{tlUserId}}",
  "managerUserId": "{{userId}}",
  "memberUserIds": ["{{staffId}}"]
}

request.description: Roles: SUPER_ADMIN, ADMIN, MANAGER, ACCOUNTANT. `tlUserId` = project TL/CAPTAIN lead. `memberUserIds` = staff working on project. Response includes `memberCount`; `workProgress` only for TL lead or Admin.

query.description: Admin filter; TL users auto-see only their projects

request.description: Each project includes `tlUserId`, populated `memberUserIds`, and `memberCount`. TL login: list is scoped to projects where you are the lead.
Success: `data.project`.
Assign/replace team: `memberUserIds`. Change lead: `tlUserId`. Members/TL: Admin, Manager, or project's TL only.
Roles: SUPER_ADMIN, ADMIN, MANAGER. Sets `isActive: false` and status `CANCELLED`.
Only SUPER_ADMIN, ADMIN, or the project's assigned TL/CAPTAIN (`tlUserId`). Returns `workProgress` (percent 0–100, note, updatedAt).
Same access as GET progress. TL updates their project; Admin any project.

Main dashboard: `data.overview.summary` (totalProjects, averageProgressPercent, revenue, …) + `data.overview.projects[]` (each with progressPercent, TL, memberCount). Admin/Manager: all projects + progress. TL: own projects + progress.

query.description: Optional ISO date — filter by project createdAt

request.description: Dashboard in `data.summary`: revenue, project counts, `totalMembers`, `averageMembersPerProject`, `byStatus`. TL login: summary scoped to their projects only.

item.name: Status Logs for a Work Item

variable.description: API server URL. Set APP_PUBLIC_URL in .env to the same value so image URLs work.
ObjectId of TL/CAPTAIN — use List TL users or Me (when logged in as TL)
Absolute URL from livePhotoUrl / certificate url — for Verify image request
